# freeipa_user (Resource)

Manages FreeIPA users.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `first_name` (String) First name.
- `last_name` (String) Last name.
- `username` (String) The username (login).

### Optional

- `carlicense` (String) Car License.
- `certificate` (String) Base-64 encoded user certificate.
- `city` (String) City.
- `class` (String) User category.
- `cn` (String) Common name.
- `departmentnumber` (String) Department Number.
- `displayname` (String) Display name.
- `email` (String) Email address.
- `employeenumber` (String) Employee Number.
- `employeetype` (String) Employee Type.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the user account is enabled.
- `fax` (String) Fax Number.
- `full_name` (String) Full name.
- `gecos` (String) GECOS.
- `gid` (Number) Group ID Number.
- `homedir` (String) Home directory.
- `initials` (String) Initials.
- `manager` (String) Manager.
- `mobile` (String) Mobile Telephone Number.
- `orgunit` (String) Org. Unit.
- `pager` (String) Pager Number.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Initial password for the user.
- `phone` (String) Telephone Number.
- `postalcode` (String) ZIP/Postal code.
- `preferredlanguage` (String) Preferred Language.
- `random_password` (Boolean) Generate a random user password.
- `shell` (String) Login shell.
- `ssh_public_keys` (List of String) List of SSH public keys.
- `staged` (Boolean) Whether the user is in staging area.
- `state` (String) State/Province.
- `street` (String) Street address.
- `title` (String) Job Title.
- `uid` (Number) User ID Number.
- `user_auth_type` (List of String) Types of supported user authentication.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique username identifying the user.
